sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_PLATFORM

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_9960cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c7b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_PLATFORM</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_PLATFORM</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_PLATFORM = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_PLATFORM.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Now Assist Core Plugin Status..","order":null,"check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check sys_store_app by scope first
    var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
    saGR.addQuery("scope", "now_assist_core");
    saGR.setLimit(1);
    saGR.query();
    if (saGR.next()) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist Core found in sys_store_app (scope: now_assist_core) v" + saGR.getValue("version"), finding: "Now Assist Core is installed. Platform-wide AI features are available." };
    }
    // Fallback: sys_plugins by name (plugin_id is null for store apps)
    var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");
    spGR.addQuery("name", "Now Assist Core");
    spGR.addQuery("active", true);
    spGR.setLimit(1);
    spGR.query();
    if (spGR.next()) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist Core found in sys_plugins (name match) v" + spGR.getValue("version"), finding: "Now Assist Core is installed. Platform-wide AI features are available." };
    }
    return { status: "blocker", actualValue: "Now Assist Core not found in sys_store_app (scope: now_assist_core) or sys_plugins.", finding: "Now Assist Core not installed. Required for all Now Assist and AI Agent features across all modules." };
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist Core is the foundational plugin that enables all Now Assist AI capabilities across every module. Without Now Assist Core active, no AI features — summarization, routing, search, or agentic workflows — can function regardless of how well the underlying data is prepared.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is a prerequisite gate — no module-specific Now Assist capabilities will function without it.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Now Assist Core Plugin Activation","order":"10","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var core = checkPlugin("now_assist_core", "now_assist_core");

    // Functional fallback: check sys_scope if not found in store/plugins
    if (!core.found) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope");
        gr.addQuery("scope", "now_assist_core");
        gr.addQuery("active", true);
        gr.setLimit(1);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) {
            core.found = true;
            core.table = "sys_scope";
        }
    }

    // Count all now_assist store apps for context
    var totalNA = 0;
    try {
        var naGA = new GlideAggregate("sys_store_app");
        naGA.addQuery("scope", "CONTAINS", "now_assist");
        naGA.addAggregate("COUNT");
        naGA.query();
        totalNA = naGA.next() ? parseInt(naGA.getAggregate("COUNT")) || 0 : 0;
    } catch(e) {}

    var actualValue = "now_assist_core: " + (core.found ? "active (source: " + core.table + ")" : "inactive") +
                      " | " + totalNA + " total Now Assist apps installed";

    if (core.found) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Now Assist Core is active (" + totalNA + " Now Assist app(s) total). Core prerequisite gate satisfied -- module-specific Now Assist capabilities can be enabled." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Now Assist Core (now_assist_core) is not active. Now Assist Core must be installed and active before any AI capability can function." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist core plugins are the prerequisite gate for all AI features. Without active plugins no Now Assist capability can function regardless of data quality or entitlement.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is the prerequisite gate for all Now Assist module capabilities.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Integration Hub Activation","order":"20","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");
gr.addEncodedQuery("name LIKEIntegration Hub^active=true");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" Integration Hub plugins active",finding:n<1?"Integration Hub is not active. AI Agents cannot perform external system automation without active Integration Hub spokes.":"Integration Hub is active -- AI Agents can leverage spokes for external automation."};
})()","ai_justification":"Integration Hub is the execution layer for AI Agent actions that interact with external systems. Without active Integration Hub spokes, AI Agents cannot perform real-world automation beyond the ServiceNow platform.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Integration Hub via sys_plugins_list.do (search: Integration Hub). Ensure the IntegrationHub Runtime and relevant spokes are active. AI Agents rely on spokes for external system actions.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Flow Designer Active Flows","order":"30","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_hub_flow');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Flow Designer flows';

    if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active Flow Designer flows. AI Agents have a strong orchestration foundation — Flow Designer is the exclusive execution layer for AI Agent automation.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active Flow Designer flows (target: 10+). Limited flow coverage restricts AI Agent operational scope — migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active Flow Designer flows. AI Agents exclusively orchestrate through Flow Designer — without flows, AI Agent automation cannot execute.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"AI Agents orchestrate all automation through Flow Designer subflows. Instances with no active flows cannot leverage Agentic AI for process automation regardless of other configurations.","remediation_guidance":"Create Flow Designer flows for key ITSM and ITOM processes via sys_hub_flow_list.do. Migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer subflows. Target: 10+ active flows. AI Agents exclusively use Flow Designer for orchestration.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Predictive Intelligence Plugin Status","order":"40","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Use functional evidence — ml_solution table existing and being valid
    // means PI is installed regardless of scope naming conventions
    var testGr = new GlideRecord('ml_solution');
    testGr.setLimit(1);
    testGr.query();
    var piActive = testGr.isValid();

    if (piActive) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'Predictive Intelligence is active',
            finding: 'Predictive Intelligence is active. AI-driven routing, similarity matching, and classification recommendations are available for Now Assist.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'Predictive Intelligence not found or inactive',
            finding: 'Predictive Intelligence is not active. PI powers Now Assist similarity matching, classification, and AI-driven routing — all of these capabilities are unavailable without PI.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Predictive Intelligence powers Now Assist similarity, classification, and routing recommendations. Without active PI, AI-driven incident routing, similar record suggestions, and field predictions are unavailable.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Predictive Intelligence (com.glide.platform_ml) via sys_plugins_list.do. Train PI solutions on incident, change, and case data after activation. PI requires a minimum of 1,000 historical records per solution to train effectively.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Predictive Intelligence Trained Solutions","order":"50","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('ml_solution');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active PI solutions found',
            finding: 'No active Predictive Intelligence solutions found. Create and train PI solutions for incident categorization, routing, and similarity before enabling Now Assist.'
        };
    }

    var gaTrained = new GlideAggregate('ml_solution');
    gaTrained.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTrained.addQuery('state', 'trained');
    gaTrained.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTrained.query();
    var trained = gaTrained.next() ? parseInt(gaTrained.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((trained / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = trained + ' of ' + total + ' active PI solutions trained (' + pct + '%)';

    if (trained >= total) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'All ' + trained + ' active PI solutions are trained. Now Assist routing and classification recommendations have full AI model coverage.'
        };
    } else if (trained >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: (total - trained) + ' of ' + total + ' active PI solutions are untrained. Untrained solutions produce zero AI recommendations — Now Assist routing and classification will have gaps.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'None of the ' + total + ' active PI solutions are trained. Now Assist routing and classification rely entirely on trained PI models — currently zero AI recommendations can be generated.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Untrained PI solutions produce no AI recommendations. Each solution must be trained on sufficient historical data before Now Assist can surface routing, classification, or similarity suggestions.","remediation_guidance":"Navigate to Predictive Intelligence > Solutions and train each active solution. Ensure a minimum of 1,000 historical records exist per solution before training. Retrain solutions after major data changes or schema updates.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Performance Analytics Indicators","order":"60","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('pa_indicators');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active PA indicators';

    if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active PA indicators. Now Assist has sufficient historical trend baseline for predictive scoring and anomaly detection.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active PA indicators (target: 10+). Limited PA coverage reduces Now Assist trend analysis depth — configure indicators for key ITSM metrics.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active PA indicators. Insufficient historical trend baseline — Now Assist predictive scoring and anomaly detection will default to point-in-time analysis only.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Performance Analytics indicators provide the historical trend data Now Assist uses for predictive scoring and anomaly detection. Instances with no PA indicators have no trend baseline for AI analysis.","remediation_guidance":"Create Performance Analytics indicators for key ITSM metrics (incident volume, MTTR, SLA compliance) via pa_indicators_list.do. Configure scheduled data collection. Target: 10+ active indicators. PA data is the historical baseline Now Assist uses for trend-based AI insights.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Instance Upgrade Currency","order":"70","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Find the most recent platform upgrade (filter for glide- prefix = platform release)
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_upgrade_history');
    gr.addQuery('to_version', 'STARTSWITH', 'glide-');
    gr.orderByDesc('sys_created_on');
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();

    if (!gr.next()) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: 'No platform upgrade history found',
            finding: 'No platform upgrade history found. Cannot determine instance release currency for Now Assist compatibility.'
        };
    }

    var version = gr.getValue('to_version') || '';
    var vLower = version.toLowerCase();
    var actualValue = 'Version: ' + version;

    // Now Assist full capability: Zurich and newer
    // Now Assist partial: Xanadu, Washington, Vancouver
    // Now Assist not supported: Utah and older
    var isCurrentGen = vLower.indexOf('zurich') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('yokohama') > -1 ||
                       vLower.indexOf('2025') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('2026') > -1;
    var isPreviousGen = vLower.indexOf('xanadu') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('washington') > -1 ||
                        vLower.indexOf('vancouver') > -1;

    if (isCurrentGen) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance is on a current-generation release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Full Now Assist and AI Agent capabilities are available.'
        };
    } else if (isPreviousGen) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance is on a previous-generation release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Some Now Assist features may be unavailable. Plan upgrade to Zurich or later for full AI capability.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance may be on an older release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Now Assist requires Xanadu or newer — upgrade is required before AI capabilities can be fully enabled.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Now Assist features ship with each release. Running an outdated release means missing AI capabilities, security patches affecting Now Assist, and potential incompatibilities with Now Assist configurations.","remediation_guidance":"Plan an upgrade to the latest Generally Available release (Zurich or newer). Now Assist capabilities expand with each release — staying current maximizes AI feature availability. Engage ServiceNow account team for upgrade planning assistance.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"MID Server Availability","order":"80","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");
gr.addQuery("status","Up");
gr.query();
var up=gr.getRowCount();
var gr2=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");
gr2.query();
var total=gr2.getRowCount();
return{status:up>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:total+" MID Servers | "+up+" Up",finding:up<1?"No MID Servers are Up. AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and on-premise integrations will fail without available MID Servers.":""+up+" MID Servers are Up and available for AI Agent execution."};
})()","ai_justification":"MID Servers are required for AI Agent-triggered discovery, external integrations, and on-premise system connectivity. Missing MID Servers create gaps in AI Agent action coverage for hybrid infrastructure.","remediation_guidance":"Deploy MID Servers for each network zone requiring AI Agent access. Validate MID Servers via ecc_agent_list.do. Upgrade MID Servers to match the instance version. AI Agents fail silently when required MID Servers are unavailable.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Update Set Discipline","order":"90","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_update_set");
gr.addQuery("state","in progress");
gr.query();
var inProgress=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:inProgress>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:inProgress+" update sets in progress",finding:inProgress<1?"No update sets currently in progress. All customizations should be tracked in update sets to prevent conflicts with Now Assist configurations during upgrades.":""+inProgress+" update sets in progress -- customization tracking is active."};
})()","ai_justification":"Untracked customizations create invisible conflicts with Now Assist configurations during upgrades. High uncaptured change rates indicate customization discipline gaps that can break Now Assist enablement.","remediation_guidance":"Enforce update set discipline by creating application-specific update sets for all customizations. Navigate to sys_update_set_list.do to review current update sets. All Now Assist configuration changes must be tracked in update sets.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Email Notification Configuration","order":"100","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_email_account");
gr.addQuery("active",true);
gr.addQuery("type","smtp-sender");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active SMTP email accounts",finding:n<1?"No active SMTP email accounts configured. AI Agents cannot send notifications without outbound email configuration.":""+n+" active SMTP accounts configured -- AI Agent notifications can be delivered."};
})()","ai_justification":"AI Agents use notification actions to communicate with users and stakeholders. Misconfigured email settings prevent AI Agent notification actions from completing successfully.","remediation_guidance":"Verify SMTP configuration via sys_email_account_list.do. Test outbound email delivery. Configure email templates for AI Agent-triggered notifications. Email is required for AI Agent stakeholder communication workflows.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"ACL Coverage on Core Tables","order":"110","check_script":"(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_security_acl");
gr.addEncodedQuery("nameINincident,task,change_request,cmdb_ci");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" ACLs on core AI tables",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" ACLs found on core AI tables (incident, task, change_request, cmdb_ci). Proper ACL coverage is required before production AI Agent enablement.":""+n+" ACLs protect core AI tables -- access control coverage is adequate."};
})()","ai_justification":"Overly permissive or missing ACLs on core tables can allow AI Agents to read or write data beyond intended scope. Proper ACL coverage is a prerequisite for production AI Agent enablement.","remediation_guidance":"Review ACLs on incident, task, change_request, and cmdb_ci tables via sys_security_acl_list.do. Ensure read/write ACLs are properly scoped for AI Agent service accounts. Test AI Agent operations against ACL policies in sub-production.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Service Portal Configuration","order":"120","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sp_portal');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Service Portal(s)';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active Service Portal(s) configured. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent can deliver self-service AI features to end users.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active Service Portals configured. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal to deliver self-service AI features to end users.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Service Portal is a primary delivery channel for Now Assist self-service AI features. Unconfigured or inactive portals prevent Now Assist from surfacing AI search, suggested articles, and virtual agent to end users.","remediation_guidance":"Verify active Service Portals via sp_portal_list.do. Ensure Employee Center or Service Portal is configured and accessible. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal for end-user delivery.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Now Assist Entitlement Verification","order":"130","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("samp_sw_license_metric");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table samp_sw_license_metric not found", finding: "License Metric table is not available. Verify the SAM plugin is active." };
    }
    var matched = {};
    function collectMatches(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("samp_sw_license_metric");
        gr.addQuery("name", "CONTAINS", keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) { matched[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true; }
    }
    collectMatches("now_assist");
    collectMatches("NowAssist");
    collectMatches("now assist");
    var count = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = count + " Now Assist license metric record(s) found";
    if (count > 0) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " Now Assist license metric record(s) found. Confirm specific module entitlements (ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, etc.) with your ServiceNow account team." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No Now Assist license metric records found. Now Assist is entitlement-gated — confirm SKU entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before beginning configuration." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist is entitlement-gated. Without confirmed SKU entitlement, plugins install but AI features do not activate. Entitlement must be verified before any Now Assist configuration work begins.","remediation_guidance":"Contact your ServiceNow account team to confirm Now Assist SKU entitlement for each module. Request entitlement confirmation in writing. Do not begin Now Assist configuration without confirmed entitlement.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Scheduled Job Health","order":"140","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaActive = new GlideAggregate('sysauto_script');
    gaActive.addQuery('active', true);
    gaActive.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaActive.query();
    var active = gaActive.next() ? parseInt(gaActive.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaErrored = new GlideAggregate('sys_trigger');
    gaErrored.addQuery('state', 'error');
    gaErrored.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaErrored.query();
    var errored = gaErrored.next() ? parseInt(gaErrored.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = active + ' active scheduled jobs | ' + errored + ' in error state';

    if (errored === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'All scheduled jobs are healthy. Background data quality processes (CMDB Health, PI Training, Discovery) are running successfully — Now Assist AI has current data to work with.'
        };
    } else if (errored <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: errored + ' scheduled job(s) are in error state. Failed jobs may silently degrade CMDB health scores, PI model training, and other data quality processes that Now Assist depends on.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: errored + ' scheduled jobs are in error state. High error rate indicates systemic scheduled job failures — background data quality processes that Now Assist depends on are likely degraded.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Scheduled jobs power AIROP assessment automation, CMDB health scoring, and PI model training. Failed or disabled jobs silently degrade the data quality Now Assist depends on.","remediation_guidance":"Review scheduled job health via sysauto_script_list.do. Investigate any jobs with Error or Skipped status. Ensure critical jobs (CMDB Health, PI Training, Discovery) are scheduled and running successfully.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Data Classification Enabled","order":"150","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check sys_scope for data classification plugin
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_scope');
    gr.addQuery('scope', 'CONTAINS', 'data_classification');
    gr.addQuery('active', true);
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    var active = gr.next();

    // Fallback: check via plugin name
    if (!active) {
        var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_plugins');
        ga.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', 'Data Classification');
        ga.addQuery('active', true);
        ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
        ga.query();
        active = ga.next() && parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) >= 1;
    }

    if (active) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'Data Classification is active',
            finding: 'Data Classification is active. Sensitive data controls are in place — Now Assist will respect classification labels when generating AI summaries and search results.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: 'Data Classification not found or inactive',
            finding: 'Data Classification is not active. In regulated environments, data classification is required to prevent Now Assist from including PII/PCI/PHI in AI prompts and generated summaries. Assess whether this is required for your compliance posture.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Data classification prevents Now Assist from including sensitive data (PII, PCI, PHI) in AI prompts and summaries. Without data classification, Now Assist may inadvertently expose sensitive information in AI-generated responses.","remediation_guidance":"Activate the Data Classification plugin and configure classification rules via dl_class_list.do. Define sensitivity labels for tables containing PII/PCI/PHI. Data classification is a compliance prerequisite for Now Assist in regulated environments.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Custom Table Cross-Scope Access Policies","order":"160","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_scope_privilege');
    ga.addQuery('target_scope.name', 'sn_now_assist');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' cross-scope access grants to sn_now_assist';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' cross-scope access grants configured for Now Assist. Now Assist can read custom table data needed for accurate AI context and recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' cross-scope access grant(s) to Now Assist (target: 5+). Missing grants may prevent Now Assist from reading custom table data needed for accurate AI context.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No cross-scope access grants to Now Assist scope. Now Assist cannot read custom table data without cross-scope access — AI context will be limited to OOB tables only.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Missing cross-scope access policies on custom tables prevent Now Assist and AI Agents from reading data they need to provide accurate AI context. Overly permissive policies expose data to unintended AI processing.","remediation_guidance":"Review cross-scope access policies for custom tables via sys_scope_privilege_list.do. Grant read access to the sn_now_assist scope for tables Now Assist needs to reference. Test AI data access in sub-production after granting.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Now Assist Admin Role Assignment","order":"170","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_user_has_role');
    ga.addQuery('role.name', 'sn_now_assist.admin');
    ga.addQuery('inherited', false);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' user(s) with sn_now_assist.admin role';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' user(s) have the sn_now_assist.admin role. Now Assist configuration access is in place — administrators can configure prompts and AI interaction settings.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No users have the sn_now_assist.admin role. This role is required to configure Now Assist prompts and AI interaction settings — without it no Now Assist setup work can proceed.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Now Assist configuration requires the sn_now_assist.admin role. Without it, admins cannot configure prompts, manage AI interactions, or adjust Now Assist settings -- blocking all Now Assist setup work.","remediation_guidance":"Assign the sn_now_assist.admin role to Now Assist configuration administrators via sys_user_has_role_list.do. Limit this role to designated AI platform administrators. This role is required to configure all Now Assist features.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Interaction Table Data Volume","order":"180","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' VA/Now Assist conversation records in last 90 days';

    if (count >= 1000) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' conversation records in the last 90 days. Now Assist has sufficient interaction history for conversational learning and response relevance improvement.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' conversation records in the last 90 days (target: 1,000+). Allow VA and Now Assist interactions to accumulate before expecting optimal AI response quality.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' conversation records in the last 90 days. Insufficient interaction history — Now Assist conversational AI has minimal data to learn from. Drive VA and Now Assist adoption first.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"The sn_hr_core.interaction and sys_cs_conversation tables store VA and Now Assist interaction history. Sufficient historical data allows Now Assist to learn from past interactions and improve response relevance over time.","remediation_guidance":"Allow Virtual Agent and Now Assist interactions to accumulate. Drive VA adoption through channel expansion and promotion. Ensure interaction data retention policies preserve sufficient history. Target: 1,000+ conversation records in the trailing 90 days.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Instance Customization Risk Score","order":"190","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBR = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    gaBR.addQuery('collection', 'IN', 'incident,task,change_request');
    gaBR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaBR.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaBR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBR.query();
    var brCount = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCS = new GlideAggregate('sys_script_client');
    gaCS.addQuery('table', 'IN', 'incident,task,change_request');
    gaCS.addQuery('active', true);
    gaCS.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaCS.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCS.query();
    var csCount = gaCS.next() ? parseInt(gaCS.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var risk = brCount + csCount;
    var actualValue = 'Risk score: ' + risk + ' (' + brCount + ' BRs + ' + csCount + ' client scripts on core AI tables)';

    if (risk <= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Customization risk score is ' + risk + ' — within acceptable range for Now Assist and AI Agent enablement.'
        };
    } else if (risk <= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Customization risk score is ' + risk + ' (target: ≤50). High customization density on core AI tables creates conflict risk with Now Assist and AI Agent operations — review before enablement.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Customization risk score is ' + risk + '. Very high customization density on incident, task, and change_request creates significant risk of Now Assist and AI Agent conflicts — remediate before enablement.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"High customization density on core tables creates risk of Now Assist conflicts during enablement. This composite score aggregates business rule, client script, and UI action counts to estimate deployment risk.","remediation_guidance":"Review the customization risk score and address high-risk items before Now Assist enablement. Focus on Business Rules that fire on insert/update of task, incident, and change_request. Document all customizations for the Now Assist configuration team.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"AI Search Index Configuration","order":"200","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("ais_search_profile");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "AI Search profile table not found", finding: "AI Search (ais_search_profile) is not installed on this instance. AI Search may not be part of the current entitlement or configuration." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("ais_search_profile");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active AI Search profile(s)";
    if (count >= 1) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active AI Search profile(s) configured. Now Assist AI Search is set up to return results to end users." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No active AI Search profiles configured. Now Assist AI Search requires at least one active search profile with indexed sources — without it AI Search returns no results to end users." };
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist AI Search requires search sources to be configured and indexed. Without configured search sources, AI Search returns no results regardless of KB content quality or volume.","remediation_guidance":"Configure Now Assist AI Search sources via sn_aisearch_search_profile_list.do. Add KB, catalog, and record sources relevant to your end-user use cases. Index each source. AI Search is entirely dependent on search source configuration.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"PLATFORM","check_name":"Employee Center Activation","order":"550","check_script":"(function() {
    var ecPro = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
    ecPro.addQuery("scope", "sn_hr_le");
    ecPro.setLimit(1);
    ecPro.query();
    if (ecPro.next()) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Employee Center Pro (sn_hr_le) is active", finding: "Employee Center Pro is active. AI-powered employee self-service experiences including Now Assist knowledge search and HR case deflection are available." };
    }
    var ec = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
    ec.addQuery("scope", "sn_hr_sp");
    ec.setLimit(1);
    ec.query();
    if (ec.next()) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: "Employee Center (sn_hr_sp) is active but Employee Center Pro is not", finding: "Employee Center is active but Employee Center Pro is not. Now Assist AI features require Employee Center Pro for full AI-powered employee self-service capabilities." };
    }
    return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Neither Employee Center nor Employee Center Pro is active", finding: "Neither Employee Center nor Employee Center Pro is active. AI-powered employee self-service experiences are unavailable without Employee Center." };
})","ai_justification":"Employee Center Pro is the delivery surface for Now Assist employee self-service AI capabilities. Without it, AI-powered knowledge search, HR case deflection, and virtual agent integrations cannot reach employees through the expected portal experience.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Employee Center Pro via the ServiceNow Store. Employee Center Pro is required for Now Assist AI-powered knowledge search, HR case deflection, and employee self-service experiences. If Employee Center is active but not Pro, upgrade to Employee Center Pro.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_PLATFORM'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:34</sys_created_on><sys_id>9960cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c7b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_PLATFORM</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_9960cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c7b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
